description_long: This house is a large, modern residential building surrounded by dense, mature trees, providing a sense of privacy and integration with nature. The structure features a flat roof with multiple levels and sections, suggesting a sprawling, open-plan layout. The exterior is primarily light-colored, likely finished in stucco or concrete, with large windows distributed irregularly across the facade. A wide, paved walkway leads to the main entrance, which is set back and partially obscured by landscaping. The house appears to have several outdoor terraces or patios, blending indoor and outdoor living spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a harmonious relationship with the surrounding greenery.
description: A large, modern house with a flat roof, light exterior, and expansive windows, surrounded by mature trees and landscaped pathways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide walkway, and dense tree coverage framing the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, multiple levels, and extensive tree coverage on both sides.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing more of the flat roof, outdoor terraces, and the house's integration with the surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying additional entry points, patios, and the layered structure of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, paved walkway leading to a recessed main door, partially obscured by trees, with no prominent porch or columns.
